description.value: Target gains +2 Constitution for the duration. Recalculate Constitution-dependent values, including Fortitude saves and max HP. Current HP does not increase when this weave is applied; if current HP exceeds max HP when the weave ends, reduce current HP to the new maximum. This bonus does not stack with other beneficial Constitution modifiers; use the highest bonus.

system.effect: Target gains +2 Constitution for the duration. Recalculate Constitution-dependent values, including Fortitude saves and max HP. Current HP does not increase when this weave is applied; if current HP exceeds max HP when the weave ends, reduce current HP to the new maximum. This bonus does not stack with other beneficial Constitution modifiers; use the highest bonus.
system.weavingRoll: Earth Potential + Earth Mastery / Time Potential + Time Mastery
